texto: Take heart now in one true thing: You will gain traction. You will grow upwards even when you think you’ve been slammed back down into that same dark hole. It will start looking like a different hole, one that might still have youcurled up and crying, but that crying will be more transformative than only desperate screams of despair. Your pain can be turned to good account. You’re not alone. You’ve gotthis handbook. Keep us with you.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Deborah Pardes: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. O trecho “Take heart now in one true thing: You will gain traction. You will grow upwards even when you thi…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, grief, healing pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de luto e mudanca.

texto: You might think that nobody’s insides are as messy as your insides. That’s an optical delusion. You only see other people’s outsides – never their insides. So you can’t possibly know.
explicacao: Citação de Deborah Pardes sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “You might think that nobody’s insides are as messy as your insides. That’s an optical delusion. Y…” articula reflexao, healing, heartbreak em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como heartbreak.
